$comment: Grimoire recipe targets for Harmony. W1 OWNS this file and seeds the base targets; later items only ADD targets (append a key), never edit an existing one — the integration master merges by key. Each target maps a stable name to the concrete project command (see CLAUDE.md Project commands).

build.description: Build the web bundle (CI-safe; full DMG build is `pnpm tauri build`).

server.description: Run the Tauri dev shell (headful; not CI-safe).

test.description: Run frontend (vitest) and backend (cargo) unit tests.

lint.command: pnpm lint && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings

smoke.description: CI-safe smoke (extended by W18): build the web bundle, cargo-check the Rust shell, run the headless visual-inspection capture over the served UI, and assert the artifact exists. No GUI window, no RetroArch, no network.
smoke.command: pnpm build && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && node scripts/visual-inspect.mjs && test -f artifacts/visual-inspection/dom.html

inspect.description: W18 visual-inspection CLI (gui-visual-inspection-cli): render the built web UI headlessly and capture a PNG screenshot + DOM dump to artifacts/visual-inspection/. Run `pnpm build` first; falls back to a static DOM dump if no headless browser is available, still producing an artifact and exiting 0.
